mnemonics: Mike's Incredible Camera Captures Visionary Images
Max's Incredible Camera Creates Visionary Images
keyPoints: The first camera was invented by Joseph Nicéphore Niépce in 1816.
The first photograph was taken by Joseph Nicéphore Niépce in 1826.
The invention of the camera led to the development of photography.
Photometry is the measurement of the quantity of light emitted or reflected by an object.
